parameters.jsCode:
return {
  paths: {
    home: process.env.HOME || '/home/ubuntu',
    base: (process.env.HOME || '/home/ubuntu') + '/AI-Lead-Agent',
    database: (process.env.HOME || '/home/ubuntu') + '/AI-Lead-Agent/database',
    workflows: (process.env.HOME || '/home/ubuntu') + '/AI-Lead-Agent/workflows',
    templates: (process.env.HOME || '/home/ubuntu') + '/AI-Lead-Agent/templates',
    logs: (process.env.HOME || '/home/ubuntu') + '/AI-Lead-Agent/logs',
    exports: (process.env.HOME || '/home/ubuntu') + '/AI-Lead-Agent/exports',
    backups: (process.env.HOME || '/home/ubuntu') + '/AI-Lead-Agent/backups',
    leadsCSV: (process.env.HOME || '/home/ubuntu') + '/AI-Lead-Agent/database/leads.csv',
    sentLogCSV: (process.env.HOME || '/home/ubuntu') + '/AI-Lead-Agent/database/sent_log.csv',
    errorLogCSV: (process.env.HOME || '/home/ubuntu') + '/AI-Lead-Agent/database/error_log.csv',
    blacklistCSV: (process.env.HOME || '/home/ubuntu') + '/AI-Lead-Agent/database/blacklist.csv',
    followupCSV: (process.env.HOME || '/home/ubuntu') + '/AI-Lead-Agent/database/followup.csv',
    templatesCSV: (process.env.HOME || '/home/ubuntu') + '/AI-Lead-Agent/database/templates.csv'
  },
  company: { name: 'LandingPagePro', industry: 'Architecture Firms', country: 'USA' },
  limits: { maxLeadsPerDay: 50, emailDelaySeconds: 120, maxFollowups: 3, followupIntervals: [3,7,14] },
  blacklistDomains: ['gmail.com','yahoo.com','hotmail.com','outlook.com','aol.com'],
  minWebsiteScore: 30,
  status: 'initialized',
  version: '1.0.0',
  timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
};
